Who I Am
Sorour
Askarzadeh
UX/UI Designer

I'm a UX/UI designer and PhD student in Rhetoric and Professional Communication at Iowa State University. My path from English literature to language teaching to UX design has shaped how I think about people — their needs, their frustrations, and the stories behind their choices. I bring a researcher's curiosity and a communicator's clarity to every project, designing interfaces that are not just usable, but meaningful.
